narrative.narrative: Gold's strength and low volatility (VIX) suggest investors are seeking safety, mirroring the sideways regime in Aug 2024 where BTC consolidated before a rally. Despite Fear & Greed at 28, maintain a neutral stance, as this pattern usually precedes a steady recovery.
narrative.headline: Bitcoin's Sideways Dance: Gold and Calm Markets Await Next Move
